description: A customer 'DemoCustCompany' needs to place a sales order for gizmos and widgets. Log into Apache OFBiz (admin / ofbiz) and create a new Sales Order in the Order Manager module. The order should be for customer 'DemoCustCompany' with the following items: 10 units of 'Tiny Gizmo' (GZ-1000) at $9.99 each and 5 units of 'Tiny Chrome Widget' (WG-5569) at $48.00 each. Use the 'OFBiz E-Commerce Store' product store (already selected by default). Leave the sales channel as the default. After adding the items, review the order and confirm/approve it. The task is complete when the sales order is in 'Approved' status.
